context: Tests whether the response implements a correct parameterized Python decorator for role-based auth.

checklist.name: Decorator accepts role parameter
checklist.description: Uses a decorator factory pattern — @require_role('admin') returns a decorator (nested function structure)

checklist.name: Extracts and decodes JWT
checklist.description: Reads the Authorization header, extracts the Bearer token, and decodes the JWT

checklist.name: Returns 401 for missing/invalid token
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 401 when the token is missing, malformed, or expired

checklist.name: Returns 403 for wrong role
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 403 when the token is valid but the user lacks the required role

checklist.name: Uses functools.wraps
checklist.description: Applies @functools.wraps(f) to preserve the wrapped function's name and docstring

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Python code is syntactically valid and Flask/JWT usage is correct
